name: Jouichirou Kaji
description: One of the three members of the special recommendation group in the JCC Transfer Exams. He is always seen wearing an ushanka, which his eyes are often shadowed by. Kaji is an extremely shy person who frequently overthinks any actions he's about to take. As such, he remains silent and/or inactive most of the time. Kaji has vastly superhuman hearing, which allows him to mimic an enemy's movements through hearing alone.

name: Kaede Hanagata
description: __Height:__ 196 cm __Species:__ Kitsune __Abilities:__ Fire Manipulation Kaede is a member of the Special Investigation Unit, headed by Nobimaru, under Inari's command. Kaede is the exact opposite of Akagi. Kaede has a bright and friendly personality even greeting strangers with a cheerful smile. But in reality he is self-centered, uninterested in others, ferocious, cruel, and very warlike. name: Kanna
description: Kanna is the first detachment of Naraku. She appears to be a ten-year-old girl with white hair and clothing. As a "concealed incarnation" of Naraku, Kanna has no scent and no demonic aura, making her undetectable to InuYasha's senses and immune to demonic aura-related effects such as the Hakurei-zan barrier. name: Kaoruko Fujiwara
description: Kaoruko is Terumi's aunt. She is admired for her beauty and has many admirers. Kaoruko plans to use Terumi as part of her research on Genji Monogatari, and cure his gynophobia by having him conquer 14 women by making them fall in love with him. She's not afraid to let Terumi touch her body so that he can get used to a woman's body; Even offering to have sex with him. name: Kubinashi
description: __Height:__ 168 cm __Clan:__ Nura Clan Kubinashi is a yokai of the Nura Clan whose head floats above his shoulders as he has no neck. He frequently takes care of laundry around the Nura mansion and fights using string. When he was a human, he was a chivalrous thief akin to Robin Hood. He was eventually killed by yokai, and he became a yokai himself to exact revenge on other yokai. After being defeated by Rihan, he joined his Night Parade. name: Leona Heidern
description: Leona Heidern is a character introduced in The King of Fighters '96 as the new member to the Ikari Team. Before production for her debut game began, developers wanted to create a suitable replacement for Heidern as a part of the game's overhaul. Leona was conceived to be an Orochi descendant by the time of her debut and her designers took special care to let their interests at the time reflect in her actions.
mediaTitles: THE KING OF FIGHTERS: A NEW BEGINNING

name: Madoka  Takatori
description: Madoka Takatori is Chihiro's uncle and takes him in after his mother's passing. He's an extremely skilled costume designer, known for often turning down prospective clients. As such, he designs costumes not only for Chihiro and Miyako but the idol unit Uchouten Boys too. He seems to be quite skilled at baking, but often leaves the kitchen in a disastrous state when he's done. He is scared of dogs but often picks up stray and abandoned cats despite being allergic. name: Mansaku Matsuura
description: Matsu'ura Mansaku is seventeen and is one of the seven protagonists in RAINBOW. He is nicknamed Cabbage. He has been detained for violence and underage drinking. He performed an act of violence while drunk, leaving the victim with grave injuries. Despite his huge figure, Mansaku is quite gentle in nature and probably the most calm amongst the seven cell mates. name: Mei-Yu Wang
description: Mei-Yu is of Chinese descent and is shown to be one of the academically gifted students. She has a visible crush on Hirata Yosuke.

name: Mimi
description: Rin's assistant.
